revision.comment: -metadata, intended for another purpose; the fix template series as a whole is metadata
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Undue weight inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Neutral point of view#Due and undue weight | title = The material near this tag may be giving undue weight to a viewpoint or idea. | text = undue weight? | post-text = – [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}#{{{1|undue}}}|discuss]] | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Articles with minor POV problems }}<!--{{Undue weight inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Undue weight inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Neutral point of view#Due and undue weight | title = The material near this tag may be giving undue weight to a viewpoint or idea. | text = undue weight? | post-text = – [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}#{{{1|undue}}}|discuss]] | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Articles with minor POV problems }}<!--{{Undue weight inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
